contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 25
- Description: Partner-page hero sweep: kill grey letterbox + fix malformed @media (35 pages)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/87
  
  Details:
  ## What changed
  
  Sweep across **35 partner pages** in `agroverse_shop` to fix two bugs in the generator template that produced them.
  
  ### 1. Grey letterbox on the hero
  
  Inline `<section>` style used `background-size: contain; background-color: #f7f7f7;`. With `min-height: 100vh` on landscape images (~1.5:1 aspect), narrow viewports got tall grey bars in the #f7f7f7 above and below the image. Operator first reported this as "too much grey background top and bottom" on the-way-home-shop; the same letterbox was happening on every partner page that used `contain`. Switched to **`cover`** — same convention every other hero in the site uses. 19 pages affected.
  
  ### 2. Malformed `@media` block (silent CSS)
  
  The generator produced:
  
  ```css
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .partner-hero-content h1 {
          ...
          display: inline-block;
      body {                          /* nested inside h1 — invalid in plain CSS */
          overflow-x: hidden;
      }
      }                               /* this closer was actually for h1 */
      .nav-links { ... }
  }
  ```
  
  Browsers tolerate it silently — the `body { overflow-x: hidden; }` nested inside `.partner-hero-content h1 { }` doesn't apply (you can't declare `body` from inside an `h1` selector in plain CSS). The mobile horizontal-scroll prevention rule **never actually fired** on any partner page. Same bug also appeared on `.mobile-menu-toggle` inside a separate `@media` block on 19 of the 35 pages.
  
  Fix: stripped each nested `body { overflow-x: hidden; }` orphan (3 lines per orphan, leaving the trailing `}` intact since it's actually the parent rule's closer). Hoisted `body { overflow-x: hidden; }` to a single top-level rule before `</style>` on every page. 21 orphans removed across 21 pages; 34 pages got the top-level rule (the-way-home-shop already had it from the prior surgical fix in PR #86).
  
  ## Verification
  
  - `grep -l "background-size: contain" partners/*/index.html` → 0 residuals.
  - Precise nested-orphan signature check (`display: …; … body { overflow-x: hidden;` within another rule's body) → 0 residuals.
  - Net: 35 files, +184 / -146 lines.
  
  ## How
  
  One-off Python script driven by precise regex matching. There's no template engine in the repo — partner pages are committed `index.html` files. **The generator that produced these pages, wherever it lives, is the actual source of these bugs and should be fixed too.** Out of scope here; flagged in the PR body. Future-Gary: when you regenerate / add a new partner page, double-check the @media block has clean CSS and the inline section style uses `background-size: cover`.
  
  ## Pull request
  
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/87 (merged)
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 41.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
